title: Joseph Sutton
compiled_truth: Joseph Sutton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-16 to 2000-11-29), Joseph Sutton sent 10 and received 168 emails, totalling 178 interactions. Top correspondents: [Pam Benson](people/pam-benson) (10), [Sanjay Bhatnagar](people/sanjay-bhatnagar) (3), [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (3), [Jeff Skilling](people/jeff-skilling) (3), [James Bannantine](people/james-bannantine) (1).
